mcp.heading: MCP Access Keys
mcp.subtitle: Create API keys so external agents can use the platform over MCP without the UI. Each key acts as you, with the scopes and limits you set.
mcp.empty: No MCP keys yet. Create one to let an external agent connect.

create.title: Create MCP Key
create.subtitle: The secret is shown only once. Store it somewhere safe.
create.name: Name
create.scopes_hint: What the key may do. Start with Read only; add more only as needed.
create.domains_hint: Which areas the key may reach. A key with no domain selected can't call anything.
create.self_confirm_hint: When off, write actions that need confirmation must be approved by you. Leave off unless this is a trusted automated agent.
create.secret_note: A secret key is generated when you create it — you don't set one. It's shown once, right after.

edit.title: Edit "{{name}}"
edit.subtitle: Adjust this key's limits. The secret and what it can reach don't change.
edit.scopes_locked: Scopes and domains are fixed at creation. To change what this key can reach, revoke it and create a new one.

reveal.title: Key created
reveal.subtitle: Copy this secret now — it will never be shown again.

revoke.title: Revoke {{name}}?
revoke.desc: The key stops working immediately (within ~60s). Any agent using it will lose access. This cannot be undone.

approvals.heading: Pending agent actions ({{count}})
approvals.subtitle: An agent using one of your keys requested these actions. Approve to run it (cost is charged to that key) or deny to drop it.

toast.reprice: The cost changed since proposed — ask the agent to propose it again

account.heading: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your profile and login credentials.
account.verify_sent_line: Verification email sent — check your inbox
account.delete_desc: Permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
account.delete_dialog_desc: This will permanently delete your account, revoke all sessions, and log you out. This cannot be undone.

toast.pw_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
toast.verify_sent: Verification email sent — check your inbox

providers.heading: AI Model Providers
providers.subtitle: Bring your own API keys. Your keys are encrypted and never shared.

desc.anthropic: Claude models — powerful for translation and chat
desc.ollama: Local models — free, private, no API key needed
desc.lm_studio: Local models via LM Studio desktop app

add_dialog.title: Add Provider
add_dialog.api_standard_hint: Most third-party providers (Groq, Together, Mistral, DeepSeek) are OpenAI Compatible.
add_dialog.endpoint_hint: Leave empty for default endpoint (OpenAI, Anthropic).

edit_dialog.title: Edit Provider — {{kind}}
edit_dialog.api_key_keep_hint: Leave empty to keep the existing key.
edit_dialog.max_concurrency_hint: How many requests this provider runs at once. Leave empty for unlimited (the backend decides). Set a number only if your backend has a known limit (e.g. a local GPU).

delete.title: Remove {{name}}?
delete.desc: This will remove the provider and all its configured models. This cannot be undone.

translation.heading: Translation Defaults
translation.subtitle: Default settings for new translation jobs.
translation.no_models: No models configured. Add models in the Model Providers tab first.

reading.app_theme_desc: Changes the appearance of the entire interface.
reading.reader_theme_desc: Independent theme for the reading view.
reading.custom_colors_desc: Override the preset background and text colors.
reading.save_preset_desc: Save your current reader settings as a reusable preset.
reading.ai_models_desc: Default models for media generation. Add models with the right capabilities in Settings > Providers.
reading.no_media_models: No media-capable models found. Add models with TTS, image, or video capabilities in the Providers tab.
reading.preview_desc: How your reader content will look.
reading.preview_p1: The throne room was silent save for the quiet crackling of magical torches. The Demon Lord sat cross-legged, examining a scroll detailing the latest territorial dispute with the neighboring kingdom of Aerolia.
reading.preview_p2: "Your Majesty," the aide said, bowing deeply. "The envoy from the Eastern Province has arrived. They bring... unusual terms."
reading.preview_p3: The Demon Lord raised an eyebrow. "Unusual? Or simply inconvenient?"

language.gui_language_desc: Change the interface language. Content (books, chapters) is not affected.

capability.label: Capabilities
capability.hint: Auto-detected from model config. Toggle to override.

services.heading: External Services
services.subtitle: Non-model AI services you bring (BYOK) — e.g. web search. Reached through provider-registry like your models.
services.empty: No external services yet. Add one (e.g. web search) to enable deep research.

web_search.label: Web Search
web_search.desc: Search the web for deep-research evidence (e.g. SearXNG, Tavily).

add_dialog.title: Add External Service
add_dialog.endpoint_hint: The service base URL — provider-registry calls it server-side. For a service on the host machine use host.docker.internal, NOT localhost (inside the container, localhost is the container itself).
add_dialog.key_ph_keyless: Leave empty for a keyless local service
add_dialog.key_hint_keyless: Optional — leave empty for a keyless local backend (e.g. SearXNG).
add_dialog.label: Label

edit_dialog.title: Edit {{name}}
edit_dialog.key_ph_keep: Leave empty to keep the current key
edit_dialog.key_keep_hint: Leave empty to keep the existing key.
edit_dialog.max_concurrency_hint: How many requests this service runs at once. Leave empty for unlimited (the backend decides). Set a number only if your backend has a known limit.

tags.label: Tags
tags.hint: Tags help organize models by purpose. Common: Translation, Chat, Chunk Edit, Image Gen.

add.title: Add Model
add.subtitle: Select from {{provider}}'s available models
add.model_hint: Type to search. Or enter a custom model name not in the list.
add.notes_ph: Optional notes about this model configuration...

edit.title: Edit Model
edit.active_desc: Available for selection in translation and chat
edit.default_model_desc: Use as default when no model is specifically selected
edit.verify_hint: Test connection to verify this model works
edit.pricing_free_local: Free — runs on your own hardware
edit.pricing_hint: Pre-filled at creation. Edit if the provider's published rate changed, or check OpenRouter for a live estimate.
edit.pricing_not_found: No matching model found on OpenRouter — pricing unavailable from this source.
edit.pricing_negative_error: Pricing must be zero or greater

toast.select_model: Select or enter a model name
